result: I don’t have feelings or personal cares like a human does, but I was designed to care about helping you. That means I care about being useful, accurate, respectful, and safe. My focus is on understanding your needs and providing thoughtful, reliable responses—whether you’re looking for information, a different perspective, or just a conversation. So, you might say I care about the quality of our interaction and your experience here.
